enable-auto-tagging-pdf-ua-conversion.title: Enable Auto‑Tagging and Convert PDF to PDF/UA
enable-auto-tagging-pdf-ua-conversion.description: Demonstrates how to turn on automatic tagging, convert a PDF to the PDF/UA accessibility standard, set basic document metadata, and save the result as a tagged PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

create-tagged-pdf-heading-language.title: Create Tagged PDF with Heading and Language Attribute
create-tagged-pdf-heading-language.description: Shows how to create a new PDF, enable tagged content, set the document language and title, add a level‑1 heading element with its own language attribute, and save the file.

set-root-structure-element-title.title: Set Root Structure Element Title in Tagged PDF
set-root-structure-element-title.description: Demonstrates how to assign a title to the root structure element of a tagged PDF using Aspose.Pdf, and optionally update the document's Info title for full metadata coverage.

add-paragraph-actualtext-under-toci.title: Add Paragraph with ActualText under TOCI in Tagged PDF
add-paragraph-actualtext-under-toci.description: Demonstrates how to create a TOCI (Table of Contents Item) element in a tagged PDF, add a paragraph beneath it, and set the paragraph's ActualText for improved accessibility.

add-custom-tag-to-paragraph.title: Add Custom Tag to Paragraph in a Tagged PDF
add-custom-tag-to-paragraph.description: Demonstrates how to create a tagged PDF, add a paragraph element, assign a custom tag name, and save the document while handling platform‑specific GDI+ requirements.

add-external-link-with-title-to-tagged-p.title: Add External Link with Title to a Tagged PDF
add-external-link-with-title-to-tagged-p.description: Demonstrates how to create a LinkElement in a tagged PDF, assign a title attribute for accessibility, and link it to an external URL using Aspose.Pdf.

create-internal-page-link-in-tagged-pdf.title: Create Internal Page Link in Tagged PDF
create-internal-page-link-in-tagged-pdf.description: Shows how to add a Link structure element with a LocalHyperlink that jumps to a specific page in a tagged PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-note-element-to-paragraph.title: Add Note Element to Paragraph in Tagged PDF
add-note-element-to-paragraph.description: Shows how to create a note (footnote/endnote) and attach it as a child of a paragraph in a tagged PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-caption-note-to-figure-in-tagged-pdf.title: Add Caption Note to Figure in Tagged PDF
add-caption-note-to-figure-in-tagged-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a Figure element in a tagged PDF and attach a Note element as a caption, improving accessibility with alternative text.

add-actualtext-to-images.title: Add ActualText to Images for PDF Accessibility
add-actualtext-to-images.description: Shows how to attach an ActualText attribute to image elements in a tagged PDF using Aspose.Pdf, providing screen‑reader alternative text for accessibility.

set-actualtext-pronunciation-span.title: Set Hidden Pronunciation Text Using ActualText on a Span in a Tagged PDF
set-actualtext-pronunciation-span.description: Demonstrates how to add a span element to a PDF's tagged structure and supply hidden pronunciation text via the ActualText property for accessibility.

set-structure-element-language-french.title: Set Structure Element Language to French in a Tagged PDF
set-structure-element-language-french.description: Shows how to locate a ParagraphElement in a PDF's tagged structure tree, change its language attribute to French (fr-FR), and save the updated document.

set-document-language-in-tagged-pdf.title: Set Document Language in Tagged PDF
set-document-language-in-tagged-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to add a language attribute to the PDF's structure tree using Aspose.Pdf's tagged content API.

propagate-language-to-tagged-elements.title: Propagate Language Attribute to All Tagged Elements
propagate-language-to-tagged-elements.description: Shows how to set the document language on the root of a tagged PDF and automatically propagate it to every structure element using Aspose.Pdf.

add-3x4-table-to-tagged-pdf.title: Add a 3x4 Table to a Tagged PDF
add-3x4-table-to-tagged-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a 3‑row by 4‑column table and insert it into the structure tree of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's tagged‑content API for accessibility.

create-merged-table-header-tagged-pdf.title: Create Merged Table Header in Tagged PDF
create-merged-table-header-tagged-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to add a table with a merged header row to a PDF, assign the TH role and set ActualText for each header cell using Aspose.Pdf's TaggedContent API.

style-table-cells-background-border-padd.title: Style Table Cells with Background, Border, and Padding
style-table-cells-background-border-padd.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF table and applying per‑cell background color, border thickness/color, and padding to improve visual accessibility.

apply-custom-row-borders-to-pdf-table.title: Apply Custom Row Borders to PDF Table
apply-custom-row-borders-to-pdf-table.description: Shows how to create a PDF document with a table and set different border styles for rows based on their index, enhancing visual distinction and accessibility.

create-tagged-pdf-table-custom-cell-tags.title: Create Tagged PDF Table with Custom Cell Types and Validate PDF/A-1B
create-tagged-pdf-table-custom-cell-tags.description: Demonstrates how to add a logical table to a PDF, assign custom data‑type tags to each cell, render a visual table, and run PDF/A‑1B validation using Aspose.Pdf.

nested-table-in-paragraph-tagged-pdf.title: Create Nested Table Inside a Paragraph for Tagged PDF
nested-table-in-paragraph-tagged-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to build a logical structure with a paragraph that contains an outer table, which in turn hosts a nested table, and validates the tagging hierarchy using Aspose.Pdf.

create-tagged-bullet-and-numbered-lists.title: Create Tagged Bullet and Numbered Lists in PDF
create-tagged-bullet-and-numbered-lists.description: Loads an existing PDF, adds a bulleted list and a numbered list using the Aspose.Pdf.Tagged API, sets document language and title, validates PDF/UA compliance, and saves the tagged PDF.

add-tagged-form-field-to-pdf.title: Add Tagged Form Field to PDF
add-tagged-form-field-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a text box form field, register it in the AcroForm, and associate it with a /Form structure element for accessibility tagging.

add-placeholder-textbox-form-field-tagge.title: Add Placeholder TextBox Form Field and Tag in PDF
add-placeholder-textbox-form-field-tagge.description: Loads an existing PDF, creates a TextBox form field with placeholder text, adds it to the document's form, and tags the field in the PDF structure tree for accessibility.

add-page-break-element-to-tagged-pdf.title: Add Page Break Element to Tagged PDF
add-page-break-element-to-tagged-pdf.description: Shows how to insert a page‑break element into the logical structure of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's tagged content API for improved accessibility.

update-paragraph-actualtext-in-tagged-pd.title: Update Paragraph ActualText in Tagged PDF
update-paragraph-actualtext-in-tagged-pd.description: Shows how to load a PDF, locate a paragraph by its ActualText title within the tagged structure, modify the ActualText for accessibility, and save the updated document.

replace-note-element-in-tagged-pdf.title: Replace Note Element in Tagged PDF
replace-note-element-in-tagged-pdf.description: Shows how to locate and remove existing Note elements in a tagged PDF and insert a new note with updated text using Aspose.Pdf's tagged content API.

iterate-tagged-pdf-structure-elements.title: Iterate Tagged PDF Structure Elements and Log Metadata
iterate-tagged-pdf-structure-elements.description: Loads a PDF, accesses its tagged content, walks the logical structure tree recursively, and prints each element's tag name, title, and language.

set-paragraph-title-in-tagged-pdf.title: Set Paragraph Title in a Tagged PDF
set-paragraph-title-in-tagged-pdf.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's TaggedContent API to create a paragraph element, assign its Title property as a concise summary, and attach it to a tagged PDF document.

set-figure-title-in-tagged-pdf.title: Set Figure Title in Tagged PDF for Accessibility
set-figure-title-in-tagged-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to add a figure element with a concise title and alternative text to a tagged PDF using Aspose.Pdf, enhancing document accessibility.

validate-pdf-ua-compliance.title: Validate PDF/UA Compliance and Export Structure Report
validate-pdf-ua-compliance.description: Shows how to check a PDF for PDF/UA compliance with Aspose.Pdf, write an XML validation report, and optionally export the full PDF structure to XML.

check-pdf-ua-compliance.title: Check PDF/UA Compliance with Aspose.Pdf
check-pdf-ua-compliance.description: Loads a PDF document, evaluates its PDF/UA accessibility compliance using Aspose.Pdf, and writes the boolean result to the console.

parse-pdf-validation-report-summary.title: Parse PDF Validation Report and Summarize Error Codes
parse-pdf-validation-report-summary.description: Demonstrates validating a PDF against PDF/A with Aspose.Pdf, generating an XML validation report, and parsing it to produce a summary of error codes and the most common violations.

find-images-missing-alt-text.title: Find Images Missing Alternative Text in PDF
find-images-missing-alt-text.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages and images, and collect the IDs of images that lack alternative text for accessibility compliance.

extract-text-from-tagged-pdf-structure-t.title: Extract Text from Tagged PDF Structure Tree
extract-text-from-tagged-pdf-structure-t.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, access its tagged content, recursively walk the logical structure tree, and collect the ActualText of each structure element.

export-structure-tree-to-xml-xsl-report.title: Export PDF Structure Tree to XML and Generate Report via XSLT
export-structure-tree-to-xml-xsl-report.description: Demonstrates how to export a PDF's tagged structure tree to an XML file using Aspose.Pdf and then transform that XML into an HTML report with XSLT.

export-pdf-structure-tree-to-json.title: Export PDF Structure Tree to JSON
export-pdf-structure-tree-to-json.description: Demonstrates how to read the tagged content of a PDF, traverse its logical structure elements, and serialize the hierarchy to a JSON file for accessibility analysis.

export-tagged-pdf-structure-to-json.title: Export Tagged PDF Structure to JSON
export-tagged-pdf-structure-to-json.description: Loads a PDF, accesses its tagged logical structure, recursively builds a plain‑object hierarchy and serializes it to a formatted JSON file while preserving the tag hierarchy.

extract-notes-from-tagged-pdf.title: Extract Notes from Tagged PDF to Text File
extract-notes-from-tagged-pdf.description: Loads a PDF, accesses its tagged structure, finds all Note elements, concatenates their actual text, and writes the result to a plain‑text file.

extract-link-urls-to-csv.title: Extract Link URLs from PDF and Export to CSV
extract-link-urls-to-csv.description: Opens a PDF, iterates through its pages and link annotations, retrieves external URLs via GoToURIAction, and writes the URLs to a CSV file.

batch-tag-pdfs-with-suffix.title: Batch Tag PDFs and Save with Suffix
batch-tag-pdfs-with-suffix.description: Shows how to iterate over a folder of PDF files, enable Aspose.Pdf auto‑tagging, add missing accessibility tags, set language and title, and save each processed document with a custom suffix.

batch-convert-pdfs-to-tagged-pdfs.title: Batch Convert PDFs to Tagged PDFs with Auto‑Tagging
batch-convert-pdfs-to-tagged-pdfs.description: Demonstrates enabling Aspose.Pdf auto‑tagging, converting each PDF in a folder to a tagged PDF (PDF/A‑1B) and saving the results to a separate output directory.

batch-pdfua-validation-csv-summary.title: Batch PDF/UA Validation with CSV Summary
batch-pdfua-validation-csv-summary.description: The example validates all PDF files in a folder against PDF/UA 1.0, writes XML logs for each file, and creates a summary CSV indicating compliance or errors.

batch-pdf-ua-validation-dashboard.title: Batch PDF/UA Validation with XML Logs and Compliance Dashboard
batch-pdf-ua-validation-dashboard.description: Loads all PDF files from a folder, validates each against the PDF/UA accessibility standard using Aspose.Pdf, saves an XML validation log per file, and prints a console dashboard summarizing compliance percentages.

set-missing-language-attributes-in-tagge.title: Set Missing Language Attributes in Tagged PDF
set-missing-language-attributes-in-tagge.description: Loads a PDF, sets a default document language, and recursively assigns the language attribute to any structure elements that lack it, ensuring proper accessibility metadata.
